      List Entries

      List all Entries based on a filter

    • listEntries

      public LedgerListEntriesResponse listEntries(String accountId) throws Exception
      List Entries

      List all Entries based on a filter

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listEntries

      public LedgerListEntriesResponse listEntries(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Entries

      List all Entries based on a filter

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of entries to return. The service may return fewer than this value Default is 100 (subject to change) The maximum is 1000, values exceeding this will be set to 1000 (subject to change)
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListEntries` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListEntries` must match the call that provided the page token in order to maintain a stable result set
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information;
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listActivities

      public LedgerListActivitiesRequestBuilder listActivities()
      List Activities

      List all Completed Activities based on a filter

      The call builder

      List Activities

      List all Completed Activities based on a filter

      accountId - The account id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listActivities

      public LedgerListActivitiesResponse listActivities(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Activities

      List all Completed Activities based on a filter

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of activities to return. The service may return fewer than this value Default is 100 (subject to change) The maximum is 1000, values exceeding this will be set to 1000 (subject to change)
      pageToken - A page token, received from a previous `ListActivity` call. Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListActivity` must match the call that provided the page token in order to maintain a stable result set
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information;
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listPositions

      public LedgerListPositionsResponse listPositions(String accountId, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Positions

      List positions based on a filter

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      pageSize - The maximum number of positions to return. The service may return fewer than this value Default is 100 (subject to change) The maximum is 1000, values exceeding this will be set to 1000 (subject to change)
      pageToken - This page token comes from a previous `ListPositions` call; provide this token to retrieve the subsequent page When paginating, all other parameters you include in `ListPositions` must match the call that includes the page token to maintain a stable result set
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information;
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
